### DEFERRED_TOOL_NAMES
WebFetch
WebSearch
mcp__opentabs__tesco_search_products
mcp__opentabs__tesco_add_to_basket
mcp__amazon-shopping__amazon_search

### SESSIONSTART_HOOKS
SessionStart hook: shop reminder, sync status, etc.

### MCP_INSTRUCTIONS
opentabs: interact with web apps through the authenticated browser session.
